title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud platform where AI agents can build, deploy, and run live software. The platform provides Ubuntu environments with database, storage, terminal, SSH, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment integration. This moves AI agents beyond code generation to actual software deployment and execution.
